scripts.test: npm run test:domain && npm run test:api && npm run test:admin-web && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:admin-mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @volt-rewards/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @volt-rewards/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @volt-rewards/admin-web && npm run typecheck --workspace @volt-rewards/mobile && npm run typecheck --workspace @volt-rewards/admin-mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @volt-rewards/domain && npm run lint --workspace @volt-rewards/api && npm run lint --workspace @volt-rewards/admin-web && npm run lint --workspace @volt-rewards/mobile && npm run lint --workspace @volt-rewards/admin-mobile
scripts.api:start: npm run build --workspace @volt-rewards/api && npm run start --workspace @volt-rewards/api
